translation_2: He passed by the shop and bought some fruit.
translation_3: I pass by this park every day.

translation_1: His room is very disorderly.
translation_2: Don't leave things in such a disorderly way.
sentence_3: 这个地方太乱了，我不喜欢。
translation_3: This place is too disorderly — I don't like it.

translation_1: The leaves fall from the tree.
translation_2: The snow falls slowly.
translation_3: The apple fell from the tree.

sentence_1: 他写文章时落了一个字。
translation_1: He left out a character when writing the article.
sentence_2: 请检查一下，别落了什么。
translation_2: Please check and make sure you haven't left anything out.
translation_3: Her name was left out of the list.

translation_1: His grades have lagged behind.
translation_2: If you don't work hard, you will lag behind.
translation_3: This place's development has lagged.

translation_1: He fell behind in the running race.
translation_2: Don't let yourself fall too far behind.
translation_3: She got sick and fell behind on many lessons.

sentence_1: 我们住在一家小旅馆里。
translation_1: We're staying in a small hotel.
sentence_2: 这家旅馆很干净，价格不贵。
translation_2: This hotel is clean and not expensive.
translation_3: Is there a hotel nearby?

sentence_1: 我们去年一起旅行了一趟。
translation_1: We traveled together last year.
sentence_2: 她自己去旅行了好几次。
translation_2: She has traveled by herself several times.
translation_3: I want to travel during summer vacation.
